properties.name: minedaily.challenge.timezone
properties.description: Official business timezone used to resolve daily challenge windows.

properties.name: minedaily.challenge.rollover-hour
properties.description: Local hour in the official timezone when the daily challenge rolls over.

properties.name: minedaily.challenge.rollover-cron
properties.description: Cron expression for scheduled current challenge provisioning.

properties.name: minedaily.challenge.rows
properties.description: Number of rows in the daily challenge board.

properties.name: minedaily.challenge.cols
properties.description: Number of columns in the daily challenge board.

properties.name: minedaily.challenge.mine-count
properties.description: Number of mines in the daily challenge board.

properties.name: minedaily.challenge.generator-version
properties.description: Version label for deterministic board generation.

properties.name: minedaily.challenge.seed-namespace
properties.description: Namespace included in deterministic internal seed derivation.

properties.name: minedaily.dev.user.enabled
properties.description: Enables the temporary in-memory development user.

properties.name: minedaily.dev.user.username
properties.description: Username for the temporary in-memory development user.

properties.name: minedaily.dev.user.password
properties.description: Password for the temporary in-memory development user.
